title: picea hirtella
intro: Picea hirtella, also known as the hairy spruce, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountains of Central and South America, characterized by its hairy branches and needles. The medicinal properties of Picea hirtella include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Picea hirtella are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Picea hirtella is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
